title: Bunnysaurus negates one attack against itself

plan.providerWarning: No WARD_LLM_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY found. The app will use local fallback plans until a server key is configured.

card.rawText: While on the field, negate an attack against this card, or negate a magic card when it is played. This effect can only be used once while this card is on the field.

plan.title: Bunnysaurus negates one attack against itself
plan.summary: Attack Bunnysaurus while its once-per-field shield is unused and verify the attack is negated without damage.

notes: Pre-place Bunnysaurus as player_1 primary creature on field.
Player_2 attacks Bunnysaurus while BUNNYSAURUS_ONCE_PER_FIELD is unused.

steps: Start a battle where player_2 attacks Bunnysaurus.
Verify Bunnysaurus takes no attack damage.

expectedAssertions.label: Bunnysaurus takes no damage from the negated attack

manualVerification: The attack and magic negation choices share the same once-per-field use.
riskNotes: This verifies the attack branch only; 013-E02 covers the magic-card branch.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_013_bunnysaurus-013-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
